'''Luther De'Ono''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] scientist working at [[ExGal-4]] on [[Belkadan/Legends|Belkadan]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]].

==Biography==
When he, [[Tee-ubo Doole]], [[Bendodi Ballow-Reese]], and [[Jerem Cadmir]] were sent to investigate an incoming storm, they soon found themselves in the midst of extremely noxious fumes, which, unbeknownst to them, were being sprayed by [[dweebit]]s, planted there by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Yomin Carr]]. When Ballow-Reese gave his [[Oxygen/Legends|oxygen]] pack to Jerem Cadmir and ran behind a bush to die, Luther tried to convince him otherwise, only to get a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] bolt in the chest from Ballow-Reese, who shot himself soon after.<ref name="Vector Prime" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' {{1st}}
